description:
The MeshEmitter component allows for emitting particles from a mesh.

This is part of the Photon Dust system by Frooxius

fields.EmitFrom: What parts of the mesh to emit from for the specified mesh.
fields.UseVertexColors: Whether or not to use interpolated vertex colors of the mesh this is emitting from.
fields.DirectionMode: How to determine the emission direction of particles emitted from this mesh.
fields.ColorTexture: The texture to sample from for the particle starting color, which is sampled from the texture via the uv coordinate of the mesh surface the particle was emitted from.
fields.WrapMode: How to wrap the texture sampling for the particle color when the uvs are beyond a 0 to 1 range.
fields.UVOffset: How much to offset the UVs before sampling for particle color.
fields.UVScale: How much to scale up/down the UVs before sampling for particle color.
fields.ClipRect: Particles will only emit if the mesh surface uv is within this clip rectangle.
fields.Mesh: The mesh to use for particle emission.
